commands: Expand the section on data simulation to include specific methodologies used to generate the dataset, ensuring it reflects the complexities of real-world customer behavior and churn patterns.
Incorporate statistical tests such as cross-validation or bootstrapping to provide a more rigorous assessment of overfitting, rather than relying solely on performance metrics.
Clarify the thresholds for AUC-ROC scores by referencing industry standards or benchmarks to substantiate the claim of 'impressive' performance.
Detail how data privacy regulations like GDPR and CCPA influenced the data simulation process, including any anonymization techniques or synthetic data generation methods employed.
